props.color: Accent color for the loading spinner — a theme name or any CSS color.
props.width: A custom width (number → px, or any CSS length).
props.fullScreen: Cover the whole viewport (minus a small inset).
props.preventClose: Don't close on backdrop click / Escape — nudge with a shake instead.
props.overflowHidden: Deprecated — the page scroll is now always locked while a dialog is open.
props.blur: Frost the backdrop with a saturated blur.
props.autoWidth: Shrink the dialog to its content's width.
props.scroll: Scroll the content area when it's tall (instead of the page).
props.notCenter: Left-align the header instead of centering it.
props.loading: Show a loading spinner over the dialog.

events.update:modelValue: Emitted when the dialog opens or closes.
events.close: Emitted when the dialog is dismissed (close button, backdrop or Escape).

slots.footer: A footer row, typically for actions.
